revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Glossary of Japanese Buddhism); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207443755 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=List|1= {{WikiProject Glossaries}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high}} }} {{Broken anchors|links= * [[Buddhism in Japan#Asuka and Nara Periods|Nanto Rokushū]] The anchor (Asuka and Nara Periods) [[Special:Diff/462790772|has been deleted]]. }} == Notes== This list was originally meant to be a ''List of Japanese Buddhist art and architecture'', useful to help people understand articles about Buddhist temples, and it still shows a considerable slant in that direction. This is deliberate, because Buddhism if very far from my competences (and my interests), and I find terms like bodhisattva very hard to understand. I am interested however in temples, hence the article. I hope someone will fill the blanks I left. [[User:Urashimataro|urashimataro]] ([[User talk:Urashimataro|talk]]) 05:12, 13 April 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Question == How should I understand: "It is a true two-story building (although the second story may be missing)..." in the kon-dō entry?[[User:Bamse|bamse]] ([[User talk:Bamse|talk]]) 15:44, 13 January 2010 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Glossary of Japanese Buddhism]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=806147814 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110221043223/http://deagostini.jp/nkd/backnumber.php?issue=1 to http://deagostini.jp/nkd/backnumber.php?issue=1 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 00:55, 20 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Noufukuji-hyogodaibutu.JPG|Noufukuji-hyogodaibutu.JPG]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files in Category:Hyogo Daibutsu|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 13:52, 10 August 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Ayakanaa]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Glossary_of_Japanese_Buddhism here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207443755 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=List|1= {{WikiProject Glossaries}} {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high}} }} {{Broken anchors|links= * [[Buddhism in Japan#Asuka and Nara Periods|Nanto Rokushū]] The anchor (Asuka and Nara Periods) [[Special:Diff/462790772|has been deleted]]. }} == Notes== This list was originally meant to be a ''List of Japanese Buddhist art and architecture'', useful to help people understand articles about Buddhist temples, and it still shows a considerable slant in that direction. This is deliberate, because Buddhism if very far from my competences (and my interests), and I find terms like bodhisattva very hard to understand. I am interested however in temples, hence the article. I hope someone will fill the blanks I left. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=806147814 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110221043223/http://deagostini.jp/nkd/backnumber.php?issue=1 to http://deagostini.jp/nkd/backnumber.php?issue=1 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 00:55, 20 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Noufukuji-hyogodaibutu.JPG|Noufukuji-hyogodaibutu.JPG]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files in Category:Hyogo Daibutsu|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 13:52, 10 August 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:38, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
